source_pipeline: configs/countries/us.yaml → sync_socrata.py + sync_census_popest.py → raw.us_sf_* → dbt_us_staging → dbt_us_analytics → dbt_us_marts → export_us_sf.py
perimeter: Adopted budget (Annual Appropriation Ordinance), ALL funds, citywide, NET of the dataset's embedded negative 'Transfer Adjustment' rows — those lines are carried explicitly (never silently netted) as transfer_adjustment_usd at every altitude and flagged in the dept × character cells.

spending.label: Department of the Status of Women

revenue.label: Department of the Status of Women

spending.label: Transfer Adjustments-Uses
spending.gloss: The negative adjustment that cancels inter- and intra-fund transfers so the citywide total counts each dollar once.

revenue.label: Non-ISF Chrgs for Svcs to Oth City Agenc
Transfer Adjustments-Sources
revenue.gloss: The negative adjustment on the revenue side that cancels inter- and intra-fund transfers so the citywide total counts each dollar once.

program_strip.note: Not rendered: this fiscal year's program dimension is the legacy per-department taxonomy (hundreds of programs), not the modern activity tags.

notes: display_name and gloss fields are a provenance-flagged IN-SESSION enrichment layer (seed_us_sf_dept_names, seed_us_sf_character_glosses, 2026-07-16) — source labels are always carried verbatim alongside and never overwritten. Departments with a null display_name (legacy years) render their source label.
